meaning: n.临时组织的一群人,一队
examples: The result was her own personal "cancer posse": a rock concert tour manager, a model, a fashion magazine editor, a cartoonist and MTV celebrity, to name a few.
A posse of tough competitors is waiting for them.
She formed a “posse” with other young women with cancer.
And then three slightly calmer men, also part of the Baron Cohen posse, wander over for a chat.
In recent years, black characters have appeared in Westerns such as Posse, Unforgiven and Django Unchained.
